base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dark_cave_total_darkness — a effect_layer from 1986 dragon quest. Full-black overlay — when no torch/radiant active. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Full-black overlay — when no torch/radiant active; only party-cell visible
